overall.description: Gameplay footage from God of War showing Kratos walking through a series of connected caves and canyons. The character moves from torch-lit interior stone tunnels through a large cavern with skylights, eventually emerging into a snowy outdoor canyon with ancient Norse carvings and fabric banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: torch-lit cave tunnel with carved stone archway

events.description: spectral figure appears standing in the archway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the red-lit cave tunnel toward the stone archway

notable_agents.action: spectral figure standing motionless in the archway ahead

entered.detail: large circular stone archway with intricate carvings marking the tunnel exit
metal bowl with flames providing warm orange light against the red cave walls
rough hewn red and orange stone walls of the cave interior

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks through a narrow torch-lit cave tunnel with red stone walls. A burning brazier provides warm light on the right as he approaches a large carved stone archway. A spectral figure stands motionless in the distant archway, creating a focal point ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large cavern chamber with skylight opening

events.description: exits narrow tunnel into large cavern with overhead skylight
natural light from skylight mixes with warm torchlight below

agents.ego_description: walking through the cavern, passing the spectral figure and turning toward an exit

entered.detail: rectangular opening in the cave ceiling allowing natural light to beam down
elevated stone ledges with wooden supports along the cavern walls

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the tunnel into a spacious cavern illuminated by a skylight overhead. Natural light beams down onto stone platforms and wooden scaffolding. The spectral figure is passed as Kratos continues through the chamber toward another tunnel exit, with lighting shifting from warm artificial to mixed natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition tunnel leading to outdoor canyon

events.description: exits cave interior into snow-covered canyon with natural daylight
lighting shifts from warm orange torchlight to cool blue natural daylight

agents.ego_description: walking through the tunnel and emerging into the snowy canyon environment

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff faces forming the narrow canyon passage
dark cloth banners hanging across the canyon entrance
white snow covering the canyon floor with scattered rocks

segments.scene_description: Kratos moves through a connecting tunnel and emerges into a snow-covered canyon. The environment transitions from warm artificial lighting to cool natural daylight. Tall canyon walls rise on both sides with fabric banners hanging overhead, and the ground becomes covered in snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient canyon passage with carved monuments and hanging banners

events.description: passing under large fabric banners suspended between canyon walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the decorated canyon, observing the ancient stone carvings

entered.detail: ancient stone structure with circular Norse carvings and symbols
tattered dark cloth banners strung across the canyon overhead
natural stone archway formed by eroded rock creating a passage

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a canyon adorned with ancient Norse architecture. Fabric banners hang overhead between the rocky walls, and a carved stone shrine with circular patterns stands prominently on the right. The path leads toward a natural rock archway ahead, with snow covering the ground and sparse dead vegetation visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy canyon with large rock formations

events.description: exits narrow canyon into wide open area with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through the open canyon toward the distant horizon under a clear sky

entered.detail: clear visible sky overhead with natural daylight illuminating the scene
massive boulders and rock outcroppings scattered across the canyon

segments.scene_description: Kratos emerges from the narrow canyon into a wide open snowy landscape. The sky is fully visible above, and large rock formations dot the terrain. The carved structures and banners are left behind as the character moves through the expansive natural canyon environment with snow-covered ground and clear visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Kratos travels from the warm, claustrophobic depths of a torch-lit cave into a vast, snow-covered canyon. It begins in a narrow tunnel of red stone, passing a burning brazier and a motionless spectral figure standing within a carved archway. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a spacious cavern where warm artificial light shifts to mixed natural light beaming down from an overhead skylight onto wooden scaffolding. The camera then follows Kratos through a connecting passage and out into the cool daylight of a snowy canyon, moving beneath hanging fabric banners and past a carved stone shrine. Finally, the narrow rocky walls give way to a wide open landscape of expansive snow and large rock formations under a clear sky.
